description: An asset manager wants to calculate a composite 'health index' for each wind turbine in a farm to prioritize maintenance.

nodes.task_description: Gather key performance and condition data for each turbine, including vibration analysis, temperature readings, and fault history.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a comprehensive dataset for all turbines.

nodes.task_description: Apply a weighted scoring model to the data to calculate a single health index score (0-100) for each turbine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates a health score for every asset.

nodes.task_description: Generate a ranked list of turbines from lowest to highest health score and recommend inspections for the bottom 10%.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a prioritized list for the maintenance team.
